title: j96w/DexCap
abstract:
[RSS 2024] "DexCap: Scalable and Portable Mocap Data Collection System for Dexterous Manipulation" code repository

# DexCap ------- ## News! 2024-08: We have released new DexCap hardware updates to address known issues. Check out [latest tutorial](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ANxSA_PctkqFf3xqAkyktgBgDWEbrFK7b1OnJe54ltw/edit#heading=h.yxlxo67jgfyx) (Hardware Setup, Software Setup, Data Collection) for more information. ------- ## Table of Contents - [Overview](#overview) - [Installation](#installation) - [Data Collection](#data-collection) - [Data Processing](#data-processing) - [Building Training Dataset](#building-training-dataset) - [Training Policy](#training-policy) - [Acknowledgements](#acknowledgements) - [BibTeX](#bibtex) - [License](#license) ------- ## Overview This repository is the implementation code for "DexCap: Scalable and Portable Mocap Data Collection System for Dexterous Manipulation" ([Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2403.07788), [Website](https://dex-cap.github.io/)) by Wang et al. at [The Movement Lab](https://tml.stanford.edu/) and [Stanford Vision and Learning Lab](http://svl.stanford.edu/). In this repo, we provide our full implementation code for [Data collection](#data-collection), [Data processing](#data-processing), [Building dataset](#building-training-dataset), and [Training policy](#training-policy). ------- ## Installation First, we install and build the environment on the mini-PC (NUC) for data collection. This installation is based on a Windows platform. After installing the [software](https://www.rokoko.com/products/studio/download) for the Rokoko motion capture glove and Anaconda, create the conda environment: The second step is to install and build environments for the Ubuntu workstation, which could also be a headless server for dataset building and training. Simply follow: ------- ## Data Collection First, start the Rokoko Studio software and make sure the motion capture glove is detected. Choose the `Livestreaming` function and use the `Custom connection` with the following settings: Make sure the NUC has been connected to the portable
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了DexCap，一个可扩展且便携的动作捕捉数据采集系统，专为灵巧操作任务设计。该系统利用Rokoko动作捕捉手套和便携式迷你PC（NUC），能够高效采集高质量的手部运动数据。我们提供了完整的数据采集、处理、数据集构建和策略训练代码。实验表明，DexCap采集的数据可用于训练灵巧操作策略，实现复杂任务。
tldr_zh: DexCap是便携式动作捕捉系统，用于灵巧操作数据采集与策略训练。
cover_zh: 戴个手套就能教机器人做精细活？这个便携系统让数据采集像玩游戏一样简单

judge.reason: 官方灵巧操作数据采集系统，含硬件、软件、训练全流程，RSS 2024 论文代码
